film.title: Sweetiee Weds NRI
film.overview: Sweetiee Weds NRI is a Bollywood comedy movie, directed by Hasnain Hyderabadawala and Written by Creative Director Tariq Mohammad. The movie stars Himansh Kohli, Zoya Afroz, Darshan Jariwalla and Kiran Joneja in lead roles.

dialogues.dialogue: What happened? Did your dad not like the profile I sent? You're not at all ashamed, are you? Ashamed? Why should I be ashamed? What has happened now?
Did your dad not like the profile I sent? You're not at all ashamed, are you? Ashamed? Why should I be ashamed? What has happened now? There Jasubhai and Rasiklal have booked flight tickets!
Listen to me very carefully. India is a male dominated society. And the groom here, always sits with pride. But did you see him? He was so scared. An NRI groom, so scared?
